political.s: Not disclosed due to private company status. No federal PAC or lobbying disclosures available.

charity.s: Launched Power of Good Fund in 2019 committing 1% of sales to charities supporting women's education, mentorship, and entrepreneurship. Partnered with Girl Rising, Step Up, and Grameen America. Employees dedicate 1% of time (three days yearly) to volunteering.

environment.s: Committed to clean ingredients (2,500+ banned) and sustainable packaging with post-consumer recycled materials and FSC-certified paper. Launched Give Back, Get Back recycling program. However, limited public sustainability reporting, no comprehensive emissions tracking, and incomplete data on full environmental impact reduction targets.

labor.s: Not disclosed. Limited publicly available data on labor practices, OSHA records, or NLRB activity. No compensation ratio data found.

dei.s: Brand emphasizes women's empowerment through Power of Good Fund and marketing campaigns featuring diverse ambassadors. Parent company Orveon (formed 2021) positions itself as purpose-driven. No formal HRC CEI certification or detailed DEI reporting publicly disclosed.

animals.s: PETA-certified cruelty-free since inception. Does not test on animals and avoids selling in China where testing is mandatory. Approximately 71% of products are vegan. Does not test on animals nor does it ask suppliers or third parties to do so on its behalf.

guns.s: Not applicable. Beauty/cosmetics company with no involvement in firearms manufacturing or sales.

privacy.s: Comprehensive privacy policy covers data collection, use, and security with SSL encryption for payment data. Compliance with CCPA, GDPR, and state privacy laws. Collects personal, payment, and behavioral data. Allows third-party tracking and data sharing with affiliated brands under Orveon. Facial data from virtual try-on is not stored by bareMinerals but by third-party PERFECT CORP.

execPay.s: Not disclosed. As a private company owned by Advent International/Orveon Global, executive compensation data is not publicly available. No SEC proxy filings or compensation transparency.
